title: The Maze Of Sleep
content:
Sleep is a pathless labyrinth,
         Dark to the gaze of moons and suns,
        Through which the colored clue of dreams,
         A gossamer thread, obscurely runs.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Clark Ashton Smith, titled "The Maze Of Sleep", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
